title: pouteria subrotata
intro: Pouteria subrotata, also known as the 'White Pouteria', is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pouteria subrotata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a valuable natural remedy. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in tinctures and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
